item.description: Tonight there’s an urgent search for answers as the mystery grows over what happened to 18-year-old Nolan Wells. The college athlete died over the Fourth of July. Authorities say he was last seen boating with friends. NBC News’ Aaron Gilchrist has the story.

media:content.media:title: Growing questions in Mississippi teen’s death
media:content.media:description: Tonight there’s an urgent search for answers as the mystery grows over what happened to 18-year-old Nolan Wells. The college athlete died over the Fourth of July. Authorities say he was last seen boating with friends. NBC News’ Aaron Gilchrist has the story.

item.title: Growing questions in Mississippi teen’s death

item.description: As the strikes traded between the U.S. and Iran escalate, President Trump casts doubt on the possibility of the two countries reaching a deal. NBC News’ Kelly O’Donnell reports on the latest with the conflict as well as the security reasons behind the President switching planes when he departed the NATO summit this week.

media:content.media:title: New video showing U.S. strikes on Iran
media:content.media:description: As the strikes traded between the U.S. and Iran escalate, President Trump casts doubt on the possibility of the two countries reaching a deal. NBC News’ Kelly O’Donnell reports on the latest with the conflict as well as the security reasons behind the President switching planes when he departed the NATO summit this week.

item.title: New video showing U.S. strikes on Iran

item.description: Los cracks de Francia aparecieron en el momento clave. Kylian Mbappé y Ousmane Dembélé firmaron dos auténticos golazos para sellar el 2-0 sobre Marruecos en los Cuartos de Final.

media:content.media:title: Mbappé y Dembélé brillan con golazos en la victoria de Francia sobre Marruecos.
media:content.media:description: Los cracks de Francia aparecieron en el momento clave. Kylian Mbappé y Ousmane Dembélé firmaron dos auténticos golazos para sellar el 2-0 sobre Marruecos en los Cuartos de Final.

item.title: Mbappé y Dembélé brillan con golazos en la victoria de Francia sobre Marruecos.

item.description: Aficionados de Francia y Marruecos vivieron con enorme intensidad los cuartos de final de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026. Los franceses celebraron el pase a semifinales, mientras la afición marroquí despidió con orgullo a su selección.

media:content.media:title: Francia celebra el pase a semifinales y Marruecos se despide con orgullo
media:content.media:description: Aficionados de Francia y Marruecos vivieron con enorme intensidad los cuartos de final de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026. Los franceses celebraron el pase a semifinales, mientras la afición marroquí despidió con orgullo a su selección.

item.title: Francia celebra el pase a semifinales y Marruecos se despide con orgullo

item.description: Francia aseguró su boleto a las semifinales de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026 tras vencer 2-0 a Marruecos. Kylian Mbappé, Ousmane Dembélé y Warren Zaïre-Emery compartieron sus sensaciones luego de una victoria que mantiene vivo el sueño del título.

media:content.media:title: Francia elimina a Marruecos y así reaccionaron los protagonistas del partido
media:content.media:description: Francia aseguró su boleto a las semifinales de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026 tras vencer 2-0 a Marruecos. Kylian Mbappé, Ousmane Dembélé y Warren Zaïre-Emery compartieron sus sensaciones luego de una victoria que mantiene vivo el sueño del título.

item.title: Francia elimina a Marruecos y así reaccionaron los protagonistas del partido

item.description: Kylian Mbappé volvió a ser decisivo en el triunfo 2-0 de Francia sobre Marruecos para clasificar a las semifinales del Mundial 2026. El delantero igualó a Lionel Messi con ocho goles en el torneo y quedó a uno de su récord histórico.

media:content.media:title: Radar Mundial: Mbappé y Francia siguen imparables en el Mundial
media:content.media:description: Kylian Mbappé volvió a ser decisivo en el triunfo 2-0 de Francia sobre Marruecos para clasificar a las semifinales del Mundial 2026. El delantero igualó a Lionel Messi con ocho goles en el torneo y quedó a uno de su récord histórico.

item.title: Radar Mundial: Mbappé y Francia siguen imparables en el Mundial

item.description: Nuestros expertos coinciden en afirmar que Francia fue muy superior a Marruecos que simplemente quedó a deber.

media:content.media:title: Andrés Guardado: “Marruecos decepcionó al respetar demasiado a Francia
media:content.media:description: Nuestros expertos coinciden en afirmar que Francia fue muy superior a Marruecos que simplemente quedó a deber.

item.title: Andrés Guardado: “Marruecos decepcionó al respetar demasiado a Francia

item.description: El director técnico de Marruecos, Mohamed Ouahbi en conferencia de prensa reconoce el esfuerzo del equipo al mencionar: “Lo intentaron todo”. A pesar de la derrota el proyecto sigue en pie y confía en la mejora para el próximo Mundial.

media:content.media:title: Mohamed Ouahbi asume responsabilidad por la derrota de Marruecos, pero confía en un mejor futuro
media:content.media:description: El director técnico de Marruecos, Mohamed Ouahbi en conferencia de prensa reconoce el esfuerzo del equipo al mencionar: “Lo intentaron todo”. A pesar de la derrota el proyecto sigue en pie y confía en la mejora para el próximo Mundial.

item.title: Mohamed Ouahbi asume responsabilidad por la derrota de Marruecos, pero confía en un mejor futuro

item.description: Didier Deschamps destacó la tercera semifinal consecutiva de Francia y valoró a sus jugadores. Kylian Mbappé aseguró estar bien tras un golpe en el tobillo, mientras Marruecos lamentó la derrota y reconoció la calidad del rival.

media:content.media:title: Francia celebra otra semifinal y Marruecos acepta el golpe
media:content.media:description: Didier Deschamps destacó la tercera semifinal consecutiva de Francia y valoró a sus jugadores. Kylian Mbappé aseguró estar bien tras un golpe en el tobillo, mientras Marruecos lamentó la derrota y reconoció la calidad del rival.

item.title: Francia celebra otra semifinal y Marruecos acepta el golpe

item.description: El Balón de Oro amplió la ventaja a favor del conjunto galo frente a Marruecos, unos instantes después de que Mbappé marcara un golazo.

media:content.media:title: Gol de Dembélé pone el segundo de Francia tras un disparo imparable para Bounou
media:content.media:description: El Balón de Oro amplió la ventaja a favor del conjunto galo frente a Marruecos, unos instantes después de que Mbappé marcara un golazo.

item.title: Gol de Dembélé pone el segundo de Francia tras un disparo imparable para Bounou

item.description: Yassine Bounou volvió a ser figura para Marruecos con una serie de intervenciones decisivas ante Francia. Aunque los africanos quedaron eliminados en cuartos de final, el guardameta se despidió del Mundial 2026 dejando otra actuación para el recuerdo.

media:content.media:title: Bounou dice adiós al Mundial dejando una colección de atajadas frente a Francia
media:content.media:description: Yassine Bounou volvió a ser figura para Marruecos con una serie de intervenciones decisivas ante Francia. Aunque los africanos quedaron eliminados en cuartos de final, el guardameta se despidió del Mundial 2026 dejando otra actuación para el recuerdo.

item.title: Bounou dice adiós al Mundial dejando una colección de atajadas frente a Francia

item.description: El zaguero marroquí sufrió todo el partido al tratar de detener a Kylian Mbappé, quien al final le ganó el duelo.

media:content.media:title: Hakimi vs. Francia: cámara exclusiva | Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026
media:content.media:description: El zaguero marroquí sufrió todo el partido al tratar de detener a Kylian Mbappé, quien al final le ganó el duelo.

item.title: Hakimi vs. Francia: cámara exclusiva | Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026

item.description: Francia derrotó 2-0 a Marruecos para asegurar su lugar en las semifinales de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026. Los galos aprovecharon sus oportunidades y dejaron en el camino a una de las selecciones que más expectativas había generado durante el torneo.

media:content.media:title: ¡Francia impone condiciones y elimina a Marruecos rumbo a las semifinales!
media:content.media:description: Francia derrotó 2-0 a Marruecos para asegurar su lugar en las semifinales de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026. Los galos aprovecharon sus oportunidades y dejaron en el camino a una de las selecciones que más expectativas había generado durante el torneo.

item.title: ¡Francia impone condiciones y elimina a Marruecos rumbo a las semifinales!

item.description: In the middle of the night, the Bayeux Tapestry, an 11th century masterpiece, was moved to London’s British Museum in a transfer shrouded in secrecy. The loan from France marks the first time the nearly 230-foot-long tapestry has returned to England in nearly 1,000 years.

media:content.media:title: The Bayeux Tapestry returns to England after nearly 1,000 years
media:content.media:description: In the middle of the night, the Bayeux Tapestry, an 11th century masterpiece, was moved to London’s British Museum in a transfer shrouded in secrecy. The loan from France marks the first time the nearly 230-foot-long tapestry has returned to England in nearly 1,000 years.

item.title: The Bayeux Tapestry returns to England after nearly 1,000 years

item.description: The New Year's Eve ball in Times Square has dropped for America's 250th anniversary, making this the first time the ball has dropped outside of a New Year's celebration.

media:content.media:title: New Year's Eve ball drops in Times Square for America's 250th
media:content.media:description: The New Year's Eve ball in Times Square has dropped for America's 250th anniversary, making this the first time the ball has dropped outside of a New Year's celebration.

item.title: New Year's Eve ball drops in Times Square for America's 250th

item.dc:creator: Kyla Guilfoil
item.description: Palm Beach International Airport is now President Donald J. Trump International Airport, and a Jefferson County bridge is the President Donald J. Trump Bridge.

media:content.media:text: A diptych image showing two roadsigns bearing Donald Trump's name.
media:content.media:description: A new sign at the French Broad River in Dandridge, Tenn., left, and on the main entrance ramp to the airport in West Palm Beach, Fla., on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: A diptych image showing scenes from Palm Beach International Airport with its new Donald Trump branding.
media:content.media:description: A new sign at the French Broad River in Dandridge, Tenn., left, and on the main entrance ramp to the airport in West Palm Beach, Fla., on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: Scott Bessent and other officials pull a white sheet off a green roadsign reading PRESIDENT DONALD J TRUMP BRIDGE
media:content.media:description: A new sign at the French Broad River in Dandridge, Tenn., left, and on the main entrance ramp to the airport in West Palm Beach, Fla., on Thursday.

item.title: On the same day, a Florida airport and a Tennessee bridge are renamed after Trump

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Makeup wipes are quick and easy, but are they actually cleaning your skin? Dermatologists explain the risks and share gentler, more effective alternatives.

media:content.media:text: Not only do makeup wipes not actually cleanse skin, they may have a negative environmental impact.
media:content.media:description: Not only do makeup wipes not actually cleanse skin, they may have a negative environmental impact.

media:content.media:text: Not only do makeup wipes not actually cleanse skin, they may have a negative environmental impact.
media:content.media:description: Not only do makeup wipes not actually cleanse skin, they may have a negative environmental impact.

item.title: Are makeup wipes helpful or harmful for your skin? Derms weigh in

item.dc:creator: Lindsay Schneider
Select Staff
item.description: We tested more than 135 face moisturizers over 4 months. Shop the 100 best face moisturizers, including top contenders from Cerave, Cetaphil and Glossier.

media:content.media:text: We tested reliable drugstore favorites, like Cerave and Cetaphil, as well as more luxurious options from brands like Augustinus Bader and Tata Harper.
media:content.media:description: We tested reliable drugstore favorites, like Cerave and Cetaphil, as well as more luxurious options from brands like Augustinus Bader and Tata Harper.

media:content.media:text: We tested reliable drugstore favorites, like Cerave and Cetaphil, as well as more luxurious options from brands like Augustinus Bader and Tata Harper.
media:content.media:description: We tested reliable drugstore favorites, like Cerave and Cetaphil, as well as more luxurious options from brands like Augustinus Bader and Tata Harper.

media:content.media:text: Former associate reporter Bianca Alvarez paid particular attention to how formulas interacted with her eczema.
media:content.media:description: We tested reliable drugstore favorites, like Cerave and Cetaphil, as well as more luxurious options from brands like Augustinus Bader and Tata Harper.

media:content.media:text: Editorial director Lauren Swanson preferred thick moisturizers that combated any flaking or peeling she had from Accutane.
media:content.media:description: We tested reliable drugstore favorites, like Cerave and Cetaphil, as well as more luxurious options from brands like Augustinus Bader and Tata Harper.

media:content.media:text: We tried reliable drugstore favorites, like Cetaphil and La Roche-Posay, as well as bestsellers from popular brands like Glossier and Jones Road Beauty.
media:content.media:description: We tested reliable drugstore favorites, like Cerave and Cetaphil, as well as more luxurious options from brands like Augustinus Bader and Tata Harper.

media:content.media:text: After testing every editor submitted both qualitative and quantitative feedback for each moisturizer.
media:content.media:description: We tested reliable drugstore favorites, like Cerave and Cetaphil, as well as more luxurious options from brands like Augustinus Bader and Tata Harper.
We tested reliable drugstore favorites, like Cerave and Cetaphil, as well as more luxurious options from brands like Augustinus Bader and Tata Harper.

media:content.media:text: Our editors paid close attention to the texture and scent of every formula.
media:content.media:description: We tested reliable drugstore favorites, like Cerave and Cetaphil, as well as more luxurious options from brands like Augustinus Bader and Tata Harper.

item.title: The 100 best face moisturizers tested and ranked, according to editors

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: Dermatologists explain how to treat peeling, pink and blistering sunburns with aloe vera, moisturizer and calamine lotion. Plus, expert tips for preventing sunburns.

media:content.media:text: Some of the best products to treat sunburns include moisturizer, aloe vera gel and hydrocortisone cream, according to dermatologists.
media:content.media:description: Some of the best products to treat sunburns include moisturizer, aloe vera gel and hydrocortisone cream, according to dermatologists.

media:content.media:text: Some of the best products to treat sunburns include moisturizer, aloe vera gel and hydrocortisone cream, according to dermatologists.
media:content.media:description: Some of the best products to treat sunburns include moisturizer, aloe vera gel and hydrocortisone cream, according to dermatologists.

item.title: Peeling, pink, itchy and blistering: How to treat all types of sunburns

item.dc:creator: Mili Godio
item.description: Tired of rough, bumpy skin? Discover expert-recommended best keratosis pilaris treatments for smoother, softer skin.

media:content.media:text: Keratosis pilaris is a very common skin condition that can appear as rough, scaly bumps on the skin, which often flare up during the wintertime or with hormonal fluctuations.
media:content.media:description: Keratosis pilaris is a very common skin condition that can appear as rough, scaly bumps on the skin, which often flare up during the wintertime or with hormonal fluctuations.

item.title: The best products for treating keratosis pilaris

item.description: Dramatic moments today in a Utah court today, when prosecutors played video of a recorded interview with Tyler Robinson's ex-roommate. The former roommate says Robinson expressed regret after the shooting. NBC News' Camila Bernal reports.

media:content.media:title: Ex-roommate: Charlie Kirk killing suspect said he wished "he hadn't done it"
media:content.media:description: Dramatic moments today in a Utah court today, when prosecutors played video of a recorded interview with Tyler Robinson's ex-roommate. The former roommate says Robinson expressed regret after the shooting. NBC News' Camila Bernal reports.

item.title: Ex-roommate: Charlie Kirk killing suspect said he wished "he hadn't done it"

item.dc:creator: Sophie Ziedalski
item.description: A man lost his hand when an explosive device detonated while he was cleaning up Fourth of July firework debris on a Northern California beach.

media:content.media:text: Waves hitting a narrow beach, seen from an elevated position
media:content.media:description: Point St. George Beach near Crescent City, Calif., in 2018.

item.title: Man’s hand blown is off as he cleans July Fourth debris off California beach

item.dc:creator: Gary Grumbach
Rebecca Cohen
Ryan J. Reilly
Gabrielle Khoriaty
Zara Morris
item.description: After the hearing, one of Hearn’s attorneys said “every American should be alarmed by this prosecution” as supporters rallied in his favor.

media:content.media:text: Judge Mulls If He Can Undo Trump Reflecting Pool Project Later
media:content.media:description: Workers clean algae from the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool in Washington, D.C., on June 17.

media:content.media:text: Protesters march before former Olympian David Hearn's arraignment on July 9, 2026 in Washington, D.C. Hearn was indicted for destruction of property after allegedly damaging the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool.
media:content.media:description: Workers clean algae from the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool in Washington, D.C., on June 17.

item.title: U.S. Olympian David Hearn pleads not guilty in Reflecting Pool vandalism case
